What's Included

Stop Guessing. Start Winning.

Weekly strategy, daily execution, and intraday opportunity — all at your fingertips the moment it matters.

📅

Daily Watchlist

Pre-market briefing every morning before the bell. Key levels, 3–4 long/short setups, earnings calendar, and economic events. Followed by a recap once the market closes.

Before Market Open
📊

Technical Analysis

Intraday chart breakdowns on high-momentum tickers. Trendline resistance, support levels, pattern completions, and annotated entries/exits posted throughout the week.

Throughout The Week
🔄

Weekly Watchlist

Automated Sunday watchlist covering key setups and levels heading into each week. Start every Monday with a structured plan rather than reacting to the open.

Every Sunday
How It Works

Simple setup. Instant access.

From checkout to your first alert in under 10 minutes.

01

Join through Whop

Choose your plan — monthly or annual — and complete checkout securely through Whop. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.

02

Connect your Discord

After checkout, link your Discord account through Whop. Takes 30 seconds.

03

Get instant role access

Your member role is granted automatically — no waiting, no manual approval. You're in immediately.

04

Read the daily watchlist before market open

Each morning before the bell you receive specific long and short setups with key levels, earnings, and economic events to watch.

05

Check the weekly watchlist every Sunday

Every Sunday evening a watchlist drops covering the top setups heading into the week. Plan ahead.

06

Follow alerts with your own risk management

Throughout the week technical analysis alerts are posted on high-momentum tickers. You decide what fits your strategy and risk tolerance — always trade responsibly.
